word: G3872 - παρακαταθήκη - parakatathḗkē - par-ak-at-ath-ay'-kay - That which is committed to

sections.paragraph:
παρακαταθήκη - parakatathēkē - par-ak-at-ath-ay'-kay

From a compound of G3844 and G2698; something put down alongside, that is, a deposit (sacred trust): - that (thing) which is committed (un-) to (trust).
